summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of ManoProtect age-segmented pages and blog articles. All 11 features tested passed successfully. New pages /sentinel-x-ninos, /sentinel-x-adultos, /boton-sos-valencia render correctly with proper H1 headings, features/use cases sections, FAQ expandable sections, testimonials, CTAs, and breadcrumbs. Three new blog articles render correctly with age-specific content and cross-links to corresponding product pages. The /blog page shows the new 'Seguridad por Edades' section with all 3 age-segmented article cards. Internal cross-linking works correctly. The /boton-sos-senior page was NOT modified and continues to work correctly.
passed_tests: TEST 1: /sentinel-x-ninos renders with correct H1 'Sentinel X para Niños y Adolescentes – Botón SOS Físico', hero, breadcrumb, features, testimonials, FAQ (expandable), CTA 'Comprar Sentinel X Niños'

TEST 2: /sentinel-x-adultos renders with correct H1 'Sentinel X para Adultos – Botón SOS Físico Personal', hero, breadcrumb, use cases, testimonials, FAQ (expandable), CTA 'Comprar Sentinel X Adultos'
TEST 3: /boton-sos-senior still works correctly and was NOT modified (H1: 'Botón SOS para Seniors: Ayuda con un Solo Toque')

TEST 4: /boton-sos-valencia renders with correct H1 'Botón SOS en Valencia', hero, breadcrumb, local testimonials, coverage zones (Valencia ciudad, L'Horta Nord, L'Horta Sud, La Safor), local business info (phone 601510950)
TEST 5: /blog/seguridad-hijos-boton-sos renders with child safety article, links to Sentinel X Niños, related articles section
TEST 6: /blog/seguridad-personal-adultos renders with adult safety article (work/sport use cases: Running, Ciclismo, PRL, trabajadores solitarios), links to Sentinel X Adultos
TEST 7: /blog/cuidado-mayores-teleasistencia renders with comparison table (Teleasistencia Tradicional vs Moderna), links to Botón SOS Senior
TEST 8: /blog page shows 'Seguridad por Edades' section with 3 age-segmented article cards: Niños 12-16, Adultos 17-55, Senior 55+
TEST 9: Internal cross-linking works: from /sentinel-x-ninos can navigate to /sentinel-x-adultos and /boton-sos-senior
TEST 11: FAQ sections are expandable (details/summary) on /sentinel-x-ninos and /sentinel-x-adultos
context_for_next_testing_agent: All age-segmented SEO pages completed successfully. New pages created: /sentinel-x-ninos (kids 12-16), /sentinel-x-adultos (adults 17-55), /boton-sos-valencia (local Valencia SEO). Three blog articles created: /blog/seguridad-hijos-boton-sos, /blog/seguridad-personal-adultos, /blog/cuidado-mayores-teleasistencia. BlogPage.js updated with 'Seguridad por Edades' section. All data-testid attributes working correctly. The /boton-sos-senior page was NOT modified and continues to work.
